subcodes.first_line: God willing, may ye ever be and continue to be favoured with the successive and continuous bounties of the All-Sufficient, the Most Exalted [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله لم یزل و لایزال بعنایات متتابعه مترادفه غنی متعال فائز باشید بعد
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment, @call to action, @predictions and prophecies, @consolation and comfort
